description_long: This is a minimalist, modern single bed with a light wood finish and a simple, rectangular frame. The bed features a solid headboard at one end and a matching footboard at the other, both with clean, straight edges. The sleeping surface is flat and appears to be divided into three sections, likely panels or slats, with no visible mattress or bedding. The frame sits low to the ground, supported by two wide side panels that extend the full length of the bed. The overall design is sleek and functional, with no decorative elements or visible hardware. Its neutral color and straightforward construction make it suitable for contemporary urban interiors or temporary outdoor urban setups.
description: A minimalist single bed with a light wood frame, solid headboard and footboard, and a flat, panelled sleeping surface. The design is modern and functional, with a neutral finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the solid headboard on the left, and the flat, panelled sleeping surface.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the headboard and the width of the bed, with the side panels visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the footboard on the right and the continuous side panel design.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the footboard and the bed's rectangular, boxy structure.
